normal: Sorry everyone, [TARGET] won't be able to make it to the gathering today — not feeling well at all and really needs to rest up.
Apologies [TARGET], I can't attend today's family event because a sudden work obligation came up that I have to handle this afternoon.
Really sorry [TARGET], I'm going to be late or may not make it — there's an urgent plumbing issue at home and I have to wait for the repair crew.
Wish I could be there [TARGET], but I've come down with something and don't want to risk getting anyone else sick. Take care everyone!
Sorry to miss it [TARGET], I had every intention of coming but my youngest isn't feeling well and I don't feel comfortable leaving them.
I'm sorry [TARGET], I can't drop by today because I have to work overtime on a sudden request from my boss that's due tomorrow.
Oh no, sorry [TARGET], I got a flat tire on my way there. I'm currently waiting for the mechanic to arrive.
Apologies [TARGET], my acid reflux is acting up again, so I really need to stay home and rest today.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't join the family gathering today, I suddenly got called in for an extra work shift.
Hello [TARGET], so sorry but I'm really not feeling well today, my stomach has been acting up since morning.
Oh no [TARGET], I can't come because there's a massive storm here and the street in front of my house is flooded.
Sorry [TARGET], I have an urgent matter with a friend who had an accident, so I have to cancel my attendance.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't join the family event. My boss suddenly asked me to handle an important client presentation this afternoon.
Hello [TARGET], I'm really sorry but I have a high fever, and I'm afraid of infecting the cousins and the little kids.
Oh no [TARGET], my car broke down and has to be towed, so I can't make it to our hometown today.
Sorry [TARGET], I have an urgent matter dealing with my lost ID card and important documents because my wallet was stolen last night.
Sorry [TARGET], there's a gas leak in my kitchen and I have to wait for the technician to come fix it.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't come to the family event because my child got severe diarrhea since dawn.
Hello [TARGET], I'm really sorry I have a sudden job interview schedule that I absolutely cannot reschedule.
Oh no [TARGET], my roof is leaking terribly from last night's rain, I'm busy moving all the furniture.
Sorry [TARGET], I bought the wrong train ticket, it's actually for tomorrow, so I can't go home today.
Sorry [TARGET], I have to standby at home waiting for a courier to deliver super important documents from my office.
ridiculous: Deeply sorry [TARGET], my only decent family-gathering outfit was commandeered as a bed by a stray cat and is now covered in inexplicably magical fur.
So sorry [TARGET], I suddenly forgot how to get back to my own house after testing a new route this morning and I've been wandering for two hours.
Sorry everyone [TARGET], the gravity of my mattress increased by approximately 500× this morning. Even blinking takes enormous effort.
My apologies [TARGET], I was all set to leave when my houseplant wilted in a very dramatic and emotionally manipulative way. I can't abandon it right now.
Really sorry [TARGET], I started ironing my shirt and somehow got absorbed into a documentary about the history of buttons. Four hours later, here we are.
Sorry [TARGET], the cake I brought was snatched by a gang of wild monkeys at the traffic light. I am too traumatized to continue my journey.
Oh [TARGET], I can't make it because my favorite pants suddenly shrank to the size of doll clothes in the wash.
I'm sorry [TARGET], I got lost in the new shopping mall for 6 hours because the escalators kept looping like an optical illusion.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't come because I got a terrible haircut and now I look like a pineapple, I'm too ashamed.
Hey [TARGET], the neighbor's cat keeps staring at me menacingly, I am too terrified to walk out the door.
Oh no [TARGET], my pants ripped wide open when I squatted earlier, and it was my only clean pair.
Sorry [TARGET], I'm waiting for a package delivery from a courier who's been lost in the woods since yesterday.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't come because I accidentally used strong glue instead of toothpaste, and my lips are sealed shut.
Hey [TARGET], my pet pigeon is heartbroken over the neighbor's dove, and I need to console him all day.
Oh no [TARGET], I'm trapped inside my room because my dog swallowed the doorknob.
Sorry [TARGET], I'm busy looking for the end of the rainbow behind my house because I heard there's a pot of gold.
Hello [TARGET], I can't come because my partner is punishing me by making me count the exact number of grains in a kilo of rice.
Sorry [TARGET], I can't come because I'm busy giving life advice to the neighbor's rooster whose crow sounds out of tune.
Hey [TARGET], a soybean got stuck in my nose and I have to find an ENT specialist open on a holiday.
Oh no [TARGET], I can't travel because my suitcase refuses to be closed even though it's completely empty.
Sorry [TARGET], I'm waiting for the ice cubes in the fridge to freeze, the process requires my full supervision.
Hello [TARGET], I can't come because I forgot how to walk, currently watching a tutorial on YouTube.
realityBending: So sorry uncle/aunt [TARGET], I'm not currently on Earth. I accidentally walked through a wardrobe portal and I'm now stranded in Narnia with a very talkative lion.
Apologies for missing it [TARGET], I got caught in a time loop. I've lived this Sunday 47 times already and I still haven't figured out how to get out.
Sorry [TARGET], I was fully ready to come, but my future self appeared in my living room and firmly forbade me from attending in order to protect the timeline.
Really sorry [TARGET], a wizard showed up at my door this morning and insisted I go on an urgent quest. I tried to explain I had plans but he was very persistent.
Apologies [TARGET], my shadow detached itself this morning and is currently impersonating me at a different family gathering. I have to stay home for identity reasons.
Sorry aunt/uncle [TARGET], my living room just lost the concept of space and time. I was stuck in a temporal paradox for five minutes that felt like ten years.
Hi [TARGET], I can't attend because aliens just landed in my backyard and are forcing me to teach them how to cook rendang.
Apologies [TARGET], my universe suddenly shifted two meters to the left, so my front door now opens into the void dimension.
Sorry [TARGET], our family tree got re-encrypted by the universe, I need a cosmic decryptor to verify I'm actually related to you.
Hey [TARGET], I got sucked into an old family photo album and am currently stuck in the year 2005.
Oh no [TARGET], my DNA is undergoing spontaneous mutation into an alien species, it's safer for you to stay away.
Sorry [TARGET], my house was lifted by a spiral vortex and just landed on an uncharted alien planet.
Sorry [TARGET], our family memories turn out to be just a simulation implant from the year 3000, I'm contacting cosmic customer service.
Hey [TARGET], my physical body is hijacked by a 4th-dimensional being, this is just a hologram of me apologizing.
Oh no [TARGET], the flow of time in my house slowed down. 1 hour for you is 1 year for me. I can't afford the trip.
Sorry [TARGET], my house was sucked into a micro black hole that spawned from my microwave oven.
Hello [TARGET], our family tree suddenly came alive and is scolding me for rarely watering its roots.
Sorry [TARGET], I accidentally deleted our family tree from the universe database, we are now bloodless strangers.
Hey [TARGET], my house shifted to the 8th dimension, I have to wait for planetary rotation to align with earth again.
Oh no [TARGET], I'm locked out of my house because my front door turned into a surrealist painting.
Sorry [TARGET], I am currently participating in a galactic tournament against future robots to save the earth.
Hello [TARGET], my true form changed into pure energy, you won't be able to see me even if I come.
